  • API Reference

authselect_test_framework.utils

Modules

authentication

Testing authentications and authorization mechanisms.

authselect

Selecting authselect profiles.

gdm

Manage GDM interface from SCAutolib.

idp

Authenticate to External Identity Providers.

ldap

Direct LDAP access to an LDAP server.

local_users

Managing local users and groups.

oddjobd

Manage oddjobd on the client.

pam

PAM Tools.

smartcard

sssctl

Manage and configure SSSD.

sssd

Manage and configure SSSD.

tools

Run various standard Linux commands on remote host.

vfido

Manage virtual FIDO device.

winbind

Manage winbind on the client.
